title: Areekkal Waterfalls
tagline: Areekkal Waterfalls — heritage city of Kerala

overview.short: Areekkal Waterfalls is located in Pampakuda around 35 kilometers away from the Ernakulam main city on the Thodupuzha- Ernakulam road.
overview.description: Areekkal Waterfalls is located in Pampakuda around 35 kilometers away from the Ernakulam main city on the Thodupuzha- Ernakulam road.

routes.byAir: Fly to nearest airport + road transfer
Fly to nearest airport + road transfer

howToReach.roadNote: Roads are generally good; check seasonal/monsoon conditions before high-altitude or remote stretches.

topPlaces.name: Pampakuda
topPlaces.description: Pampakuda is a village and Panchayath part of Muvattupuzha Taluk. It lies between Muvattupuzha and Piravom towns.

topPlaces.name: Kakkoor
topPlaces.description: Kakkoor is a village situated in the eastern part of Ernakulam district in Kerala, south of India. Kakkoor is famously known for Kakkoor Kalavayal the agricultural fest conducted every year in the month of Kumbham in the Malayalam calendar.

topPlaces.name: Onakkoor
topPlaces.description: Onakkoor is a village in Ernakulam district in the Indian state of Kerala. The main attractions in the village are Onakkoor River and Onakkoor Temple.

topPlaces.name: Marady
topPlaces.description: Marady is a village in Ernakulam district in the Indian state of Kerala. Marady Grama Panchayath office is located in South Marady.

topPlaces.name: Ramamangalam
topPlaces.description: Ramamangalam is a village in Ernakulam district in the Indian state of Kerala, it lies between Kolenchery, Piravom and Muvattupuzha towns. This small town lies in the Muvattupuzha taluk.

topPlaces.name: Meenkunnam
topPlaces.description: Meenkunnam is a village with waterfalls, rocky terrains, small hills, and paddy fields. It is located within Arakuzha and Marady Panchayat, Kerala.

topPlaces.name: St. Mary's Church, Marady
topPlaces.description: St. Mary's Jacobite Syrian Church is a church located in Kurukkunnapuram, East Marady, Muvattupuzha, Kerala, India.

topPlaces.name: Edayar
topPlaces.description: Edayar is a small village of Koothattukulam municipality in Ernakulam district and located at a distance of 6 km from Koothattukulam town and 8 km from Piravom in Kerala, India.

faq.q: What is the best time to visit Areekkal Waterfalls?
faq.a: The best time to visit Areekkal Waterfalls is Nov – Feb. Summers are 26–36°C and winters are 22–32°C.

faq.q: How do I reach Areekkal Waterfalls?
faq.a: The nearest airport is Cochin International Airport, Kochi (30 km) and the nearest railway station is Ernakulam Junction (Kochi) (28 km). Roads are generally good; check seasonal/monsoon conditions before high-altitude or remote stretches.

faq.q: How many days are enough for Areekkal Waterfalls?
faq.a: 3 days are usually enough to cover the top attractions of Areekkal Waterfalls at a relaxed pace.

faq.q: How much does a hotel cost in Areekkal Waterfalls?
faq.a: Stays in Areekkal Waterfalls start from ₹900 per night, with options across 4 price categories.

faq.q: What are the top places to visit in Areekkal Waterfalls?
faq.a: The top attractions are Pampakuda, Kakkoor, Onakkoor, Marady, Ramamangalam.
